fix_instructions.Analytics: Check API connection and update API key in settings, ensure correct video and subscriber tracking codes are installed
fix_instructions.Competitor Spy: Update competitor list and ensure correct API credentials are in place, re-run analysis with updated parameters

fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker: Verify YouTube Partner Program (YPP) application status and ensure correct monetization settings
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Configure video review settings and ensure correct API credentials are in place, run initial video review analysis

growth_tactics: Collaborate with other psychology/motivation channels for cross-promotion

analysis.view_drop_analysis: Views are currently at 0, which is expected for a new channel. Focus on creating high-quality content, optimizing video metadata, and promoting the channel through social media and collaborations to increase views
follower_growth_tips: Engage with viewers by responding to comments and creating a community around the channel
